translations.![播放按鈕/藍色為原始點擊區域/紅色為擴大後的點擊範圍](/assets/a8: ![Play button / Blue is the original clickable area / Red is the expanded clickable area](/assets/a8c2d7ed144b/1*EvI5wmNos0TjGDrapnHLgg.png)
translations.#### 經過以上思路…我們可以：\n\n: #### After the above ideas… we can:
translations.***完成！經過不斷的改進，在解決這個議題上更簡潔方便了不少！***\n\n: ***Done! After continuous improvements, solving this issue has become much simpler and more convenient!***
translations.*使用 Storyboard/xib 時記得設 `Custom Class` 為: *When using Storyboard/xib, remember to set the `Custom Class` to MyButton*
translations.> ***Done! After continuous improvements: > ***Done! After continuous improvements, solving this issue has become much simpler and more convenient!***
translations.> *When using Storyboard/xib, remember t: > *When using Storyboard/xib, remember to set the `Custom Class` to MyButton*
translations.> `touchEdgeInsets` *expands outward fro: > `touchEdgeInsets` *expands outward from (0,0) as the center, so the distances for top, bottom, left, and right must be **negative** to extend.*
translations.`touchEdgeInsets` *以(0,0)自身為中心向外，所以上下左右的: `touchEdgeInsets` *expands outward from (0,0) as the center, so the distances for top, bottom, left, and right must be **negative** to extend.*
translations.使用上如前述使用範例。\n\n: Usage as shown in the previous example.
translations.使用時只需記得要將 Button 的 Class 指定為我們自訂的 MyButt: When using, just remember to set the Button's Class to our custom MyButton, then you can expand the clickable area for each Button by setting `touchEdgeInsets`!
translations.去年同一時間想開個小分類「 **顧小事成大事** 」紀錄一下日常開發瑣碎的小事，: Around the same time last year, I wanted to create a subcategory "**Small Things Lead to Big Things**" to record daily trivial development tasks. These small tasks quietly add up and improve both the app’s experience and code quality. However, after [delaying for a year](../6012b7b4f612/), I finally added another article <(_ _)>. Small things are really easy to forget to document!
translations.因 Extension 不能包含 Property 否則會報編譯錯誤「Exten: Since Extensions cannot contain stored properties or they will cause a compile error "Extensions must not contain stored properties," here we refer to [Using Property with Associated Object](https://swifter.tips/associated-object/){:target="_blank"} to associate the external variable `buttonTouchEdgeInsets` with our Extension, allowing it to be used like a regular property. (For detailed explanation, please see [Mao's article](https://swifter.tips/associated-object/){:target="_blank"})
translations.對於每個 UIButton 都要置換成自訂的 MyButton 其實挺繁瑣的也增: Replacing every UIButton with a custom MyButton is quite tedious and increases code complexity, which may cause conflicts in large projects.
translations.對於這種我們認為應該所有 UIButton 天生都應該要具有的功能，如果可以，我: For this feature that we believe every UIButton should have by default, if possible, we want to directly extend the original UIButton using an Extension:
translations.後來改用排版的方式解決，按鈕在排版時設定上下左右都對齊0 (或更低)，再控制 `: Later, the issue was solved by layout adjustments. The button’s top, bottom, left, and right constraints were set to 0 (or less) during layout, then the `imageEdgeInsets`, `titleEdgeInsets`, and `contentEdgeInsets` were controlled to push the icon/button title to the correct UI design position. However, this method is more suitable for projects using Storyboard/xib, as you can adjust the layout directly in Interface Builder. Another point is that the designed icon should preferably have no extra spacing; otherwise, positioning becomes difficult, sometimes stuck at a 0.5 distance that can’t be aligned properly.
translations.播放按鈕/藍色為原始點擊區域/紅色為擴大後的點擊範圍\n\n: Play button / Blue is the original touch area / Red is the expanded touch area
translations.日常開發上經常遇到版面照著設計 UI 排好之後，畫面美美的，但是實際操作上按鈕的: In daily development, it's common to have a UI layout that looks perfect according to the design, but the actual button touch areas are too small, making accurate taps difficult—especially unfriendly for users with larger fingers.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.正所謂見多識廣，最近接觸到新專案之後又學到了一小招；就是可以在 UIButton: As the saying goes, the more you see, the more you know. Recently, after starting a new project, I learned a neat trick: you can enlarge the event response area in UIButton's pointInside method. By default, it uses UIButton's bounds, but you can extend the bounds inside to make the button's clickable area larger!
translations.自訂一個 UIButton ，增加 `touchEdgeInsets` 這個 p: Create a custom UIButton and add a public property `touchEdgeInsets` to **store the expanded touch area** for easy use; then override the pointInside method to implement the above idea.
translations.重寫 pointInside 擴大感應區域\n\n: Override pointInside to Expand the Touch Area
translations.針對圖片點擊、我們自己在 View 上加的 Tap 手勢；\nㄧ樣能透過複寫 U:
For image taps and tap gestures added to the View,  
you can achieve the same effect by overriding UIImageView's pointInside method.
translations.關於這個問題當初沒特別深入研究，直接暴力蓋一個範圍更大的透明 UIButton: Regarding this issue, I didn't research it deeply at first. I simply overlaid a larger transparent UIButton on the original button and used this transparent button to handle events. This approach is very troublesome and hard to manage when there are many components.
